## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Release or packaging

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] Manual Obsidian check, if UI or plugin behavior changed

## Manual Checks

<!-- Describe what you tested in Obsidian, if applicable. -->

## Screenshots or Demo

<!-- Add screenshots, GIFs, or notes for UI changes. -->

## Risk Notes

<!-- Mention privacy, provider, Apply safety, context capture, or migration risks. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] README updated, if behavior changed
- [ ] Settings migration considered, if settings changed
- [ ] Apply safety preserved, if output/editing changed
- [ ] Provider privacy and SecretStorage behavior preserved, if provider code changed
- [ ] Release assets considered, if this is a release change
